menu.title: A lonely green slime
menu.guideStory: A lone green slime in a pixel world. Endless monsters close in—dodge and fight back with your cells to survive. Grow stronger with fragments and badges; last 30 minutes to escape!!
menu.guideGoal:
Goal
• Survive as long as you can. Last 30 minutes to earn a score bonus.
• Submit your final score to the leaderboard and share with other players.
menu.guideControls:
Controls
• WASD or Arrow keys: Move
• ESC: Pause and badge slots
menu.guideCombat:
Combat
• Cells orbiting the slime auto-attack nearby enemies.
• Defeated enemies drop coins → score.
• Taking damage reduces HP; brief invincibility after hit.
menu.guideGrowth:
Growth
• Fragments: Appear on the map. Open them for upgrades or a badge draw.
• Badges: Equip in empty slots or replace existing badges. Effects apply while equipped.

overlay.enterNickname: Enter nickname and submit your score.
overlay.feedbackModalHeader: Please share any inconveniences, suggestions, or reviews. Your feedback helps improve the game. Thanks.

upgrade.title: Picked up!
upgrade.alreadyEquippedDud: This badge is already equipped.. (So… yeah, it's a dud.)

pause.confirmToMain: Abandon current progress and go to main menu?

chain_attack.name: Chain Attack
chain_attack.description: When a cell hits an enemy, it **chains** to another nearby enemy then returns to orbit.

i_am_legend.name: I Am Legend
i_am_legend.description: Spawn **1.5×** more monsters on the field.

fragment_collector.name: Fragment Collector
fragment_collector.description: Fragments spawn rate increases by about **30%**.

give_me_more_plus.name: Give Me More+
give_me_more_plus.description: Coins dropped by monsters grant **2×** score. (Stacks with badges of the same effect.)

give_me_more.name: Give Me More
give_me_more.description: Coins dropped by monsters grant **1.5×** score. (Stacks with badges of the same effect.)

regen.name: Regen
regen.description: Heal **+2** HP every 60 seconds, but taking damage adds **+1** damage.

one_more.name: One More
one_more.description: You can **spin the badge draw one more time**.

cell_limit_plus.name: Extra Cells+
cell_limit_plus.description: Max cell limit **+2**. (Stacks with badges of the same effect.)

blood_hungry.name: Blood Hungry
blood_hungry.description: Restore **+2** HP every 300 kills; taking damage adds **+1** damage.

extra_heart_limit_plus.name: Extra Heart Limit+
extra_heart_limit_plus.description: Max HP limit **+4**. (Stacks with badges of the same effect.)

smaller_plus.name: Smaller+
smaller_plus.description: Character becomes **even** smaller. (Stacks with badges of the same effect.)

cell_limit.name: Extra Cells
cell_limit.description: Max cell limit **+1**. (Stacks with badges of the same effect.)
